docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF SC-100 FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIN, SHENGYI SERVED SEP-20-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MADARANG, KAITLYN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-27-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIN, SHENGYI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MADARANG, KAITLYN $305.00 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $337.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $885.00 FILED BY LIN, SHENGYI AS TO DEFENDANT MADARANG, KAITLYN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-27-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-27-2010. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, NO EXHIBITS DETAINE BY THE COURT. MATTER TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-27-2010 BY JPT. DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. (506)
